message:
Command `# No metrics output - OpenROAD definitely crashed during check_antennas.
# Same PSM-0069 issue: check_antennas -verbose internally runs PSM which fails
# on VCCD/VSSD analog rails.
#
# SOLUTION: Run antenna check manually, WITHOUT PSM check.
# We can modify the antenna check to use check_antennas WITHOUT -verbose
# OR skip PSM connectivity.
# Let's first understand how PSM is invoked:

grep -rn "check_antennas\|antenna\|psm\|PSM" \
    /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/../share/openroad/ 2>/dev/null | \
    grep -i "psm\|connectivity" | head -5 || true

# Check if check_antennas has a -no_connectivity flag
/nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -no_splash -exit << 'EOF' 2>&1 | grep -i "check_antennas\|antenna\|usage" | head -10
help check_antennas
EOF` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# No metrics output - OpenROAD definitely crashed during check_antennas.
# Same PSM-0069 issue: check_antennas -verbose internally runs PSM which fails
# on VCCD/VSSD analog rails.
#
# SOLUTION: Run antenna check manually, WITHOUT PSM check.
# We can modify the antenna check to use check_antennas WITHOUT -verbose
# OR skip PSM connectivity.
# Let's first understand how PSM is invoked:

grep -rn "check_antennas\|antenna\|psm\|PSM" \
    /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/../share/openroad/ 2>/dev/null | \
    grep -i "psm\|connectivity" | head -5 || true

# Check if check_antennas has a -no_connectivity flag
/nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -no_splash -exit << 'EOF' 2>&1 | grep -i "check_antennas\|antenna\|usage" | head -10
help check_antennas
EOF"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command exited with code 2 and error:
/bin/bash: line 17: warning: here-document at line 15 delimited by end-of-file (wanted `EOF')
/bin/bash: -c: line 18: syntax error: unexpected end of file

extras.command:
# No metrics output - OpenROAD definitely crashed during check_antennas.
# Same PSM-0069 issue: check_antennas -verbose internally runs PSM which fails
# on VCCD/VSSD analog rails.
#
# SOLUTION: Run antenna check manually, WITHOUT PSM check.
# We can modify the antenna check to use check_antennas WITHOUT -verbose
# OR skip PSM connectivity.
# Let's first understand how PSM is invoked:

grep -rn "check_antennas\|antenna\|psm\|PSM" \
    /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/../share/openroad/ 2>/dev/null | \
    grep -i "psm\|connectivity" | head -5 || true

# Check if check_antennas has a -no_connectivity flag
/nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -no_splash -exit << 'EOF' 2>&1 | grep -i "check_antennas\|antenna\|usage" | head -10
help check_antennas
EOF
